steps.title: Compare the spread values
steps.content: Standard deviation measures spread. The two groups have the same mean, so the key difference is the standard deviation.

steps.title: Identify the larger spread
steps.content:
Group A has standard deviation $12.5$, and Group B has standard deviation $19.1$.
$$
19.1>12.5
$$
So Group B has the larger spread.

steps.title: Select the matching statement
steps.content: The statement saying Group B's heights had a larger spread is the one supported by the table. The answer is C.
